description: Create a cumulative revenue growth analysis in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset to visualize how revenue accumulates over time for different product categories. Generate a Line Chart showing 'Sales' as a running sum by 'Order Date' at a monthly granularity, broken down by 'Product Category'. Save the workbook as 'Cumulative_Growth_Analysis' to your Documents folder (Cumulative_Growth_Analysis.dva).
